JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERKS JULIE WILSON/NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-04-2002 AT 9:25 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE ELAN WICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS "HEARING REQUIRED". THEREFORE, THE COURT DENIED DEFENDANT ELENA DEEDS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-29-2002 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR JURY TRIAL IS STRICKEN AND TRIAL DATE IS CONFIRMED. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: VALERIE PAPALE.

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-brenda fields, 9:29AM:
c/c for jury trial, Jeffrey E. Margulies appearing for the plaintiff, no appearance by pro per defendant Elena Deeds. Case proceeds as a prove-up without defendant. Mr. Margulies waives opening statements and begins case in chief by calling 1st witness. Jeff Leiberg is sworn and examined. Exhibit 1: the lease, and exhibit2: a 3 day notice are identified and admitted. Witness is thanked and excused. There being no cross-examination, plaintiff rests and submits the prayer.
Court rules as follows:
Restitution & possession of premises at 935 Geary St., #103; forfeiture of agreement; $1390.00 rent, and per diem damages of $22.41, for total rents and damages of $2847.23; and costs of $150.00.
9:34AM
Plaintiff to submit judgment, evidence is withdrawn and returned, court adjourns.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Continued To Nov-04-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Valerie Papale. Jeffrey Evan Margulies, Esq. represented the plaintiff. There being no appearance by the defendant, the Court ordered the matter off the settlement conference calendar. The request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq. of BRAVO & MARGULIES 512-6700, for plaintiff LEM/REY
Property, opposing party. Also present was process server Jud Hoganas
No appearance by moving party. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, the Court denied Defendant ELENA DEEDS' motion to quash service of summons or stay or dismiss. (JJM/301/DR) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
